name: io.github.xenarch-ai/xenarch-mcp
description: Xenarch — x402 MCP server for AI agent payments. Non-custodial, USDC on Base L2.

environmentVariables.description: Wallet private key (hex, 0x-prefixed). Auto-generates on first run if omitted.
environmentVariables.name: XENARCH_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Local per-call payment cap in USDC (default 1.00). The only spending ceiling in standalone mode; set 0 to disable. Connect XENARCH_API_TOKEN for managed per-tx/daily/monthly caps.
environmentVariables.name: XENARCH_MAX_PAYMENT_USD

environmentVariables.description: Wallet private key (hex, 0x-prefixed). Auto-generates on first run if omitted.
environmentVariables.name: XENARCH_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Local per-call payment cap in USDC (default 1.00). The only spending ceiling in standalone mode; set 0 to disable. Connect XENARCH_API_TOKEN for managed per-tx/daily/monthly caps.
environmentVariables.name: XENARCH_MAX_PAYMENT_USD

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'http' to enable HTTP transport
environmentVariables.name: TRANSPORT
